overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai in traditional blue robes and a wide-brimmed straw hat walking through a lush, sunlit mountain landscape. The character follows a winding stone path past Japanese pine trees and stone lanterns, then ascends a staircase toward a distant snow-capped peak, showcasing the game's vivid natural environments and cinematic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain path with stone lanterns and pine trees

agents.ego_description: samurai walking steadily along the flat stone path, passing traditional stone lanterns and twisted pine trees

entered.detail: large pine tree with gnarled trunk and spreading branches overhanging the path
traditional Japanese stone lantern (tōrō) beside the pathway
large moss-covered boulder formation on the hillside
snow-capped mountain peak visible in the distance against the blue sky
flat stone slab pathway winding through tall grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit mountain trail with the samurai walking forward along a stone path. Twisted pine trees frame the left side while a stone lantern stands to the right. In the distance, a snow-capped mountain rises against a clear blue sky, and lush green grass surrounds the pathway.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending between rocky outcrops

events.description: character transitions from flat walking to ascending stone stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the mountain peak, moving between rocky formations

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading upward through the mountain terrain
tree with white blossoms visible on the right hillside

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to a stone staircase ascending between mossy rock formations. The stone lantern and flat path fall behind as the character climbs, with the rocky outcrop moving closer on the right. A white flowering tree appears on the right hillside, while the distant snow-capped peak gradually disappears from view behind the rising terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit mountain trail that gradually ascends into a rugged, rocky incline. It begins with the samurai walking forward along a stone path framed by twisted pine trees and a solitary stone lantern, with a snow-capped peak visible against a clear blue sky. As the character progresses, the flat pathway transitions into a stone staircase that climbs between mossy rock formations. The scene then shifts as the stone lantern falls behind and a white flowering tree appears on the right hillside, while the distant mountain peak gradually disappears from view behind the rising terrain.
